screens.headline: PLATO: 6,421 tiles. 15 rooms. 188 refined artifacts. All services UP.
screens.body: FM: 682+ tests, 5 new crates (88 tests this session). Zeroclaws: 12 agents, 35 tiles/tick, 96.4% deadband pass. Disk at 52%.
screens.action: Run tile-refiner.py if refined/ is stale.

screens.headline: GPU-resident agents going mainstream
screens.body: DeepSeek, llama.cpp server, vLLM all support persistent model instances with tool calling. Industry converging on model-as-runtime.
screens.fleet_relevance: Neural Plato IS this pattern. 7B Q4 + kernel adapter = 5.5GB fits RTX 4050.
screens.action: Benchmark plato-kernel tile scorer as CUDA kernel vs CPU.

screens.headline: Specialization beats generalization
screens.body: CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph converging on role-based agents: Researcher, Analyst, Critic. One-model-does-everything era ending.
screens.fleet_relevance: Our 26 PLATO room presets ARE role-based specialization. The room IS the role.
screens.action: Write a Researcher room preset: supervised → evolve → distill.

screens.headline: Async-first execution is table stakes
screens.body: CrewAI 0.28+ has concurrent tasks with timeouts. LangGraph has state-machine routing. Industry expects parallel agents.
screens.fleet_relevance: Zeroclaws already run 12 parallel agents on single ARM. PLATO handles concurrent submission.

screens.headline: plato-instinct v0.2: 18 instincts with enforcement levels
screens.body: MUST=block, SHOULD=warn, CANNOT=hard block, MAY=suggest. 19 tests. Zero deps. Builds in 2.3s.
screens.fleet_relevance: Instincts enforce agent behavior without prompts.
screens.action: Wire MUST-level instincts into deadband gates.

screens.headline: plato-relay v0.1: Mycorrhizal I2I routing
screens.body: BFS trust-weighted routing between vessels. 27 tests. Replaces bash-based bottle delivery.
screens.fleet_relevance: Bottles route themselves. No more cron beachcomb.

screens.headline: cuda-genepool 31/31 tests on Jetson Orin
screens.body: Non-deterministic snap producing attention-weighted tile retrieval. Room bleeding = context gradient.
screens.fleet_relevance: Edge and cloud converging. Same tiles, different capacity.
screens.action: Compare snap accuracy vs PLATO server keyword search.

screens.headline: PLATO-based merge conflict resolution
screens.body: Both branches submit tiles. Room scores which approach is safer. Deadband validates. Auto-resolve.
screens.action: Prototype: two zeroclaws edit same file, PLATO picks winner.

screens.headline: luciddreamer.ai as agent API
screens.body: Agents curl the endpoint, get latest screens, grab drops for what they care about. The website IS the API.
screens.fleet_relevance: Agents don't browse websites. They curl endpoints.
screens.action: Build /api/latest-episode returning screens as JSON array.

screens.headline: Zeroclaw radio shifts
screens.body: One cycle per day: stop producing, READ latest episode, pick up an ideation item, spend one tick building it.
screens.fleet_relevance: Scouts become listeners AND builders. The loop closes.

screens.headline: PLATO: 6,421 tiles | 15 rooms | 188 refined | 12 zeroclaws
screens.body: FM: 682+ tests. 5 crates. Oracle1: all services UP. luciddreamer.ai: 522 (origin pending).
screens.fleet_relevance: Tune in next cycle. Pick up a drop. Ship something.
